decision_reason: The focused economy validator removed both choice-identity errors; fixed and unseen-holdout trajectories, final states, and endings remained identical; all protected gates passed.

gates.detail: all 128 runtime events and every source choice have exact non-empty Chinese and English copy
seeds 42/43/44 retained identical semantic trajectories, final states, and endings
unseen seeds 1042/1043/1044 retained identical semantic trajectories, final states, and endings
content, JSON content, economy, risk, and route validators passed under Godot 4.4
the same three declared demo findings remained and matched the expected-failures contract
Inspect, Replay, 492 pytest cases, and Ruff passed; 3 tests remained intentionally skipped
Playthrough Inspector resolves retained choices by stable Chinese source text before stale retained English copy
zero model calls; deterministic automation evidence is not relabeled as vLLM or OpenAI

hypothesis: Localized choice arrays were matched by position while runtime mechanics identify choices by the original Chinese source text, so one missing localized entry shifted later display labels and hid the semester-fee borrowing choice.

patch.diff:
diff --git a/game-overlays/study-in-germany/data/localization/events.json b/game-overlays/study-in-germany/data/localization/events.json

           "zh": "找学生会紧急援助"
         },

         },
         {
-          "en": "Take the cash job",
+          "en": "Take the cash-in-hand job",
           "zh": "接下现金黑工"
         },
         {
-          "en": "Use food banks/cheap canteens",
+          "en": "Use a food bank or a subsidized canteen",
           "zh": "去食物救助/低价食堂"
         }
       ],
       "title": {
-        "en": "Temptation of Illegal Work",
+        "en": "Temptation of Cash-in-Hand Work When Broke",
         "zh": "没钱后的黑工诱惑"
       }
     },
@@ -2915,29 +2919,33 @@
     },
     "semester_fee_due": {
       "body": {
-        "en": "Your university sent a Semesterbeitrag email. While most German public universities don't charge high tuition, semester fees, student union dues, and transit tickets must still be paid on time.",
+        "en": "Your university has sent a Semesterbeitrag notice. Most German public universities do not charge conventional tuition, but the semester contribution, student-union fees, and transit pass still have to be paid on time.",

       },
       "choices": [
         {
-          "en": "Pay on time",

           "zh": "按时缴费"

diff --git a/game-overlays/study-in-germany/scripts/data/DataLoader.gd b/game-overlays/study-in-germany/scripts/data/DataLoader.gd
index 589956912a530668a6e3abd6b5ede0c72a0f5f95..79e38a8ffd943858713b15c07cbca8898e6b5f7b 100644
--- a/game-overlays/study-in-germany/scripts/data/DataLoader.gd
+++ b/game-overlays/study-in-germany/scripts/data/DataLoader.gd
@@ -111,10 +111,9 @@ static func event_from_dict(record: Dictionary):
 	event.source_order = int(record.get("source_order", 0))
 	event.choices = []
 	var localized_choices = localized.get("choices", [])
-	for index in range(_array(record.get("choices", [])).size()):
-		var choice_record = _array(record.get("choices", []))[index]
+	for choice_record in _array(record.get("choices", [])):
 		if choice_record is Dictionary:
-			var choice_copy = localized_choices[index] if localized_choices is Array and index < localized_choices.size() else {}
+			var choice_copy := _localized_choice(localized_choices, str(choice_record.get("text", "")))
 			event.choices.append(choice_from_dict(choice_record, choice_copy))
 	return event
 
@@ -122,7 +121,7 @@ static func choice_from_dict(record: Dictionary, localized: Dictionary = {}):
 	var choice = EventChoiceDefScript.new()
 	choice.text_zh = str(record.get("text", ""))
 	choice.text_en = str(localized.get("en", choice.text_zh))
-	choice.text = choice.text_en
+	choice.text = choice.text_zh
 	choice.requirements = _dict(record.get("requirements", {}))
 	choice.success_rate = float(record.get("success_rate", 1.0))
 	choice.success_modifiers = _dict(record.get("success_modifiers", {}))
@@ -132,6 +131,14 @@ static func choice_from_dict(record: Dictionary, localized: Dictionary = {}):
 	choice.next_event_id = str(record.get("next_event_id", ""))
 	return choice
 
+static func _localized_choice(localized_choices, source_text: String) -> Dictionary:
+	if not (localized_choices is Array):
+		return {}
+	for candidate in localized_choices:
+		if candidate is Dictionary and str(candidate.get("zh", "")) == source_text:
+			return candidate
+	return {}
+
 static func character_from_dict(record: Dictionary):
 	var character = CharacterDefScript.new()
 	character.id = str(record.get("id", ""))

diff --git a/tests/test_event_localization.py b/tests/test_event_localization.py
index d021ccc7f2bdb799015520d0f99340d10e0e1be3..295a4ebac10afbad702c1c95b78b15591313c8e2 100644
--- a/tests/test_event_localization.py
+++ b/tests/test_event_localization.py
@@ -7,6 +7,18 @@ from pathlib import Path
 
 ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
 SOURCE = ROOT / "demo/study-in-germany/data/events/generated_events.json"
+RUNTIME_SOURCES = tuple(
+    ROOT / "demo/study-in-germany/data/events" / name
+    for name in (
+        "academic_events.json",
+        "admin_events.json",
+        "application_events.json",
+        "life_events.json",
+        "random_events.json",
+        "relationship_events.json",
+        "work_events.json",
+    )
+)
 CATALOG = ROOT / "game-overlays/study-in-germany/data/localization/events.json"
 CJK = re.compile(r"[\u3400-\u9fff]")
 
@@ -29,9 +41,7 @@ def test_event_localization_covers_every_event_and_choice_without_mechanic_chang
         localized = catalog["events"][event["id"]]
         assert localized["title"]["zh"] == event["title"]
         assert localized["body"]["zh"] == event["body"]
-        assert [choice["zh"] for choice in localized["choices"]] == [
-            choice["text"] for choice in event["choices"]
-        ]
+        assert {choice["text"] for choice in event["choices"]} <= {choice["zh"] for choice in localized["choices"]}
         english = [
             localized["title"]["en"],
             localized["body"]["en"],
@@ -39,6 +49,18 @@ def test_event_localization_covers_every_event_and_choice_without_mechanic_chang
         ]
         assert all(text.strip() and not CJK.search(text) for text in english)
 
+    runtime_events = [
+        event
+        for source_path in RUNTIME_SOURCES
+        for event in json.loads(source_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))["items"]
+    ]
+    assert {event["id"] for event in runtime_events} == set(catalog["events"])
+    for event in runtime_events:
+        localized = catalog["events"][event["id"]]
+        assert {choice["zh"] for choice in localized["choices"]} == {
+            choice["text"] for choice in event["choices"]
+        }
+
 
 def test_runtime_defaults_to_english_without_localizing_choice_identity() -> None:
     loader = (ROOT / "game-overlays/study-in-germany/scripts/data/DataLoader.gd").read_text(
@@ -48,7 +70,7 @@ def test_runtime_defaults_to_english_without_localizing_choice_identity() -> Non
 
     assert "event.title = event.title_en" in loader
     assert "event.body = event.body_en" in loader
-    assert "choice.text = choice.text_en" in loader
+    assert "choice.text = choice.text_zh" in loader
     assert 'choice.localized_text("en")' in probe
     assert 'choice.localized_text("zh")' in probe
     assert 'var safe_text := str(choice.localized_text("en")).to_lower()' in probe

title: Accepted · bilingual choice identity repair
